title: luzula hawaiiensis var. glabrata
intro: Luzula hawaiiensis var. glabrata, also known as the smooth Hawaiian woodrush, is a subspecies of the Luzula hawaiiensis plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Juncaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Luzula hawaiiensis var. glabrata include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for skin conditions and injuries. In traditional Hawaiian herbal preparations, the plant was often used to make poultices and infusions for treating various health issues.
